name: Galos
bio:
Heavenly Warrior, a member of the Holy Light Crusade who fights against darkness as the Radiant Judge. Representing light and order, he fights for justice.

Role: Physical Debuff
Intro: A Physical Control-type hero with decent Defense; can deal Physical Damage to an enemy column and stun them.

skillSlots.name: Lightlance Thrust
skillSlots.description: Deals 113% P.DMG to an enemy column with 70% probability to reduce target's Hit Rate by 15% for 2 turns.

skillSlots.name: Divine Light Impact
skillSlots.description: Attacks the enemy with highest ATK, dealing 233% P.DMG with 50% probability to inflict <color=#FFEB04>[Stun]</color> for 1 turn.
